name: Ulta Beauty, Inc.
summary: Ulta Beauty, Inc. is an international specialty beauty retailer founded in Illinois in 1990. It is the largest specialty beauty retailer in the U.S., offering cosmetics, fragrance, skin care, hair care, wellness products, and salon services across prestige, mass, and salon price points. It operates over 1,500 U.S. stores, digital platforms, and has international presence through Space NK (U.K. and Ireland), a Mexico joint venture, and a Middle East franchise.
